recalls.Description:
Johnson Health Tech Trading is recalling BowFlex 552 and 1090 Adjustable Dumbbells due to a potential impact hazard. The affected products include the Model 552, which adjusts from 5 to 52.5 pounds, and the Model 1090, which adjusts from 10 to 90 pounds. These dumbbells were sold in pairs and single units, featuring black handles, weight plates, and a molded plastic tray. The model and serial numbers can be found on a sticker at the bottom of the tray. Specific serial number ranges for both models are included in this recall notice.

Consumers are advised to stop using these dumbbells immediately and reach out to Johnson Health Tech Trading for remedies, which may include refunds or replacements depending on the point of sale. Johnson Health Tech Trading is actively contacting known purchasers to facilitate the recall process.
recalls.Title: Recall of BowFlex Adjustable Dumbbells Due to Impact Hazard Affecting 3.7 Million Units
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Johnson Health Tech Trading at 800-209-3539 from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email recall@bowflex.com, or visit www.bowflex.com/recalls.

Images.Caption: Recalled BowFlex 552 52.5 LB Adjustable Dumbbell serial number location
Recalled BowFlex 1090 90 LB Adjustable Dumbbell serial number location

Injuries.Name: Johnson Health Tech Trading has received 12 reports of the plates dislodging during use with no injuries for units it sold. Nautilus received 337 reports of the plates dislodging during use for units it sold, including 111 resulting in injuries such as concussions, abrasions, broken toes or contusions.

Retailers.Name: Available at Johnson Fitness & Wellness, DICK'S Sporting Goods, Best Buy stores, and online at www.Bowflex.com and www.Amazon.com from 2004 through April 2024 by BowFlex Inc., and from May 2024 through May 2025 by Johnson Health Tech Trading.

Importers.Name: BowFlex Inc., (formerly Nautilus Inc.), of Vancouver, Washington
Johnson Health Tech Trading Inc., of Cottage Grove, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: Risk of weight plates dislodging from the handle during use, creating an impact hazard.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the dumbbells and contact Johnson Health Tech Trading for a refund or replacement. Refunds for BowFlex Inc. purchases include a prorated voucher and a one-year JRNY digital fitness membership.

recalls.metaDescription: Johnson Health Tech Trading recalls BowFlex Adjustable Dumbbells due to impact hazards. Learn how to get a refund or replacement.

recalls.Description: PowerBlock is recalling the Commercial Pro 100 weight set, which consists of a Pro Rack Stand, two adjustable weight plate sets, and a pair of grip handles weighing 10 lbs and 5 lbs. The 5 lb grip handles, identifiable by their black color and knurled grip featuring a silver decal with weight increments, are the focus of this recall. This recall only affects the 5 lb grip handles included in the Commercial Pro 100 set.
recalls.Title: PowerBlock Recalls Commercial Pro 100 Weight Sets with 5 lb Grip Handles Due to Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact PowerBlock at 800-997-3999 from 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or visit www.powerblock.com/pages/product-recalls. You can also find more information by going to www.powerblock.com and clicking on "Voluntary Recall" at the bottom of the homepage.

Products.Name: Commercial Pro 100 Weight Set with 5 lb Grip Handles
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 1,845 (In addition, about 18 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Commercial Pro 100 sold with 5 lb grip handles

Injuries.Name: PowerBlock has received four reports of weight plates slipping beyond the handle during use. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at powerblock.com, roguefitness.com, lifefitness.com, and various fitness equipment retailers including Advanced Exercise Equipment, Advantage Sport & Fitness, American Barbell, BeaverFit USA, BSN, Carolina Fitness Equipment, Gopher Sport, Sorinex, and US Fitness Holdings from March 2023 through July 2024, priced around $1,500.

Hazards.Name: Risk of weight plates above 55 lbs dislodging from the 5 lb grip handles, leading to potential impact injuries.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the affected grip handles immediately and reach out to PowerBlock for guidance on obtaining free replacement handles. PowerBlock will also contact all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: PowerBlock recalls Commercial Pro 100 weight sets due to potential injury risk from 5 lb grip handles. Contact for free replacements.

recalls.Description: iFIT has announced a recall for the ProForm Rapid Strike 50 LB Adjustable Dumbbell Set, model PAMSDB20. These dumbbells, sold in black, come with handles, weight plates, and a molded plastic tray. They can be adjusted from 5 to 50 pounds using a manual selection pin, with weights stored in the base. The model number can be found on a sticker located under the lip of the molded tray.
recalls.Title: iFIT Issues Recall for ProForm 50 LB Adjustable Dumbbells Due to Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled dumbbells immediately and contact iFIT at 833-680-4348, available from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. MT Monday through Friday, or via email at pamsdb20-recall@ifit.com. More information can be found at www.proform.com/product-recalls or by visiting www.proform.com and selecting "Voluntary Recall" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: ProForm Rapid Strike 50 LB Adjustable Dumbbell Set
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 54,400 (In addition, about 650 sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled iFIT ProForm Rapid Strike 50 LB Adjustable Dumbbell Set
Recalled iFIT ProForm Rapid Strike 50 LB Adjustable Dumbbell Set
Recalled iFIT ProForm Rapid Strike 50 LB Adjustable Dumbbell Set

Injuries.Name: The firm has received eight reports of weight plates dislodging during use with three resulting in injuries, including contusions and abrasions.

Retailers.Name: Available at ProForm.com, Amazon.com, DicksSportingGoods.com, Lowes.com, and Walmart.com from February 2021 to May 2024, priced around $350.

Importers.Name: iFIT Inc., f/k/a Icon Health & Fitness, of Logan, Utah

Hazards.Name: Risk of weight plates dislodging from the handle, leading to potential impact injuries.

Remedies.Name: Consumers will receive a free repair through a replacement molded tray by contacting iFIT. The company is reaching out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: iFIT recalls ProForm 50 LB Adjustable Dumbbells due to injury risks. Stop using immediately and contact for a free replacement.
